meaning: n.白鼬,雪貂,侦探,细带vt.用雪貂打猎,追赶,搜出,驱出vi.用雪豹狩猎,搜索
examples: The team is trying to ferret out missing details.
We only showed it in mice, so one has to extend this to other animal models—the ferret and the guinea pig.
I leave it to the reader to ferret these out.
Assume there are mistakes in your plan and ferret them out, finding your stress points.
On the positive side, we have more tools available than ever to ferret out the scams.
